title: deer-flow.tool.call v1
description: Per-tool-call lifecycle event emitted by deer-flow's ToolMetricsMiddleware. Three events per call share the same tool_call_id: one started, then either completed or errored. Emit site: deer-flow/backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py:287 (emit_tool_call_event). Source: /deer-flow/harness.

subject.description: Typically the thread_id, used as CloudEvent subject for partitioning

tool_call_id.description: Shared across the started → completed/errored event triple for one call

tool_name.description: Name of the tool being invoked

args_preview.description: Stringified preview of tool arguments; emitted only when available

result_preview.description: Stringified preview of the tool result; emitted only when available

error_detail.description: Error message; emitted only on errored events

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the tool call in ms, rounded to 1 decimal; emitted on completed/errored

started_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the call started; emitted when available
